title: More Dogs Mod
description:
This mod adds a new dog skins from newer minecraft versions, enjoy!
Note as of March 2026: This mod will not be getting any more updates.
body:
**More Dogs Mod**        
Adds a new dog variants from newer minecraft versions (1.21+) and i added it into Forge 1.20.1.
There are not all variants, only some, but some are better than none, right?

Features:           
5 new dog variants           
Working animations          
Some dogs can be Tamed, but they don't follow you          
When Tamed, they can sit, but not visually            



I know that this is not the best mod ever, but i tried :D

**ENJOY**

Note as of March 2026: This Mod will not be getting any more updates.
